allow: Bash(cd /c/Users/new11/personnel/hot-news && python -c "import httpx;r=httpx.post\('https://api-article.huxiu.com/web/article/articleList',data={'platform':'www','recommend_time':'0','pagesize':'20'},headers={'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0 Chrome/120','Content-Type':'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'},timeout=15\);d=r.json\(\);print\('success:',d.get\('success'\)\);dd=d.get\('data',{}\);print\('data keys:',list\(dd.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(dd,dict\) else type\(dd\).__name__\);dl=dd.get\('datalist',[]\) if isinstance\(dd,dict\) else [];print\('datalist:',len\(dl\)\);print\('first:',dl[0].get\('title',''\)[:40] if dl else 'EMPTY'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/new11/personnel/hot-news && python -c "import httpx;r=httpx.get\('https://api.juejin.cn/content_api/v1/content/article_rank?category_id=1&type=hot&count=30',headers={'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0 Chrome/120'},timeout=15\);d=r.json\(\);articles=d.get\('data',[]\);print\('count:',len\(articles\)\);print\('first keys:',list\(articles[0].keys\(\)\)[:8] if articles else 'EMPTY'\);a=articles[0] if articles else {};print\('content_id:',a.get\('content_id',''\)\);c=a.get\('content',{}\);print\('title:',c.get\('title',''\)[:50] if isinstance\(c,dict\) else 'content type: '+type\(c\).__name__\)" 2>&1)
